hero.title: Hide From The Villain Wiki
hero.description: Hide From The Villain is a Roblox 1-vs-all stealth survival game where survivors hide from a villain, stay alive until help arrives, collect TEMP V powers to fight back, earn VC, redeem codes, and unlock villain skins.

gameFeature.title: Hide From The Villain Gameplay
gameFeature.description: A Roblox 1-vs-all stealth survival game where survivors hide from a villain, stay alive until help arrives, collect TEMP V powers to fight back, and redeem codes for VC.

hftvCodes.title: Hide From The Villain Codes
hftvCodes.intro: Redeem active Hide From The Villain codes for VC, TEMP V, and other survival rewards. Use the Codes button inside the Roblox experience to claim them.

steps.title: Open the game
steps.description: Launch Hide From The Villain from the official Roblox experience page.

steps.title: Open the Codes menu
steps.description: Click the Codes button on the left side of the screen.

steps.title: Enter the code
steps.description: Paste the code into the text box exactly as shown, including capitalization.

steps.title: Redeem the reward
steps.description: Press Redeem to claim the reward. If a new code does not work, rejoin the game to move into a newer server.

hftvOfficialLinks.title: Hide From The Villain Official Roblox Link
hftvOfficialLinks.intro: Play the official Hide From The Villain Roblox experience by Splitline: World. Use the official Roblox page, group, and Discord to avoid fake mirrors and script pages.

items.label: Genre
items.description: Hide From The Villain is listed as a survival experience with a 1-vs-all structure.

items.label: Core Setup
items.description: One villain hunts survivors while players hide, survive, and look for ways to fight back.

items.label: Fight-Back Mechanic
items.description: Players can find TEMP V during a run to gain powers and fight back against the villain.

hftvBeginnerGuide.title: Hide From The Villain Beginner Guide
hftvBeginnerGuide.intro: Learn the basic loop in Hide From The Villain: hide, survive, use stealth, and decide when TEMP V is worth the risk.

steps.title: Start with survival, not heroics
steps.description: Your first job in Hide From The Villain is to stay alive until help arrives. Move with purpose and avoid standing in open areas.

steps.title: Use stealth as your default plan
steps.description: The official game description tells players to hide and use stealth. Prioritize cover, corners, and safer routes before trying risky plays.

steps.title: Watch the villain's pressure
steps.description: When the villain is close, stop taking wide routes and focus on breaking line of sight. A short safe reposition beats a dramatic sprint.

steps.title: Search for TEMP V when the route is safe
steps.description: TEMP V lets survivors gain powers and fight back. Look for it when you have room to move, not when the villain is already closing in.

steps.title: Use TEMP V to change the round
steps.description: TEMP V is best used when fighting back creates survival value: escaping pressure, protecting a critical moment, or forcing the villain to back off.

steps.title: Check codes before long sessions
steps.description: Hide From The Villain codes can give VC and TEMP V. Redeem them before playing so you start with more resources.

hftvTempVPowers.title: Hide From The Villain TEMP V Powers Guide
hftvTempVPowers.intro: TEMP V is the key fight-back mechanic in Hide From The Villain. It turns a run from pure hiding into a chance to push back against the villain.

faqs.question: What does TEMP V do in Hide From The Villain?
faqs.answer: TEMP V gives survivors powers that let them fight back against the villain. The official game description frames it as the main alternative to hiding and waiting for help.

faqs.question: How do players get TEMP V in Hide From The Villain?
faqs.answer: Players can find TEMP V during a match. Hide From The Villain codes can also reward TEMP V, including GAMEISBACK, SORRY4SHUTDOWN, 100KMembers, and 5kCCU.

faqs.question: When should beginners use TEMP V in Hide From The Villain?
faqs.answer: Use TEMP V when it can help you survive pressure, escape a dangerous situation, or create space from the villain. Avoid wasting it during calm moments where hiding already works.

faqs.question: Should Hide From The Villain players hide or fight?
faqs.answer: Start by hiding and using stealth. Fight back with TEMP V when the villain's pressure becomes too high or when a powered play can safely change the round.

faqs.question: Which Hide From The Villain codes give TEMP V?
faqs.answer: GAMEISBACK gives 300 VC and 3 TEMP V. SORRY4SHUTDOWN gives 150 VC and TEMP V. 100KMembers and 5kCCU give VC and TEMP V.

faqs.question: What is the safest TEMP V habit in Hide From The Villain?
faqs.answer: Keep your escape route in mind before activating or using TEMP V. Powers are useful, but being trapped after using them is still a reliable way to lose the round.

hftvVCCurrency.title: Hide From The Villain VC Currency Guide
hftvVCCurrency.intro: VC is the main currency in Hide From The Villain. Players use it to unlock villain skins and buy survival tools such as First Aid Kits and TEMP V.

rows.howToGet: Earn VC by playing rounds or redeeming active Hide From The Villain codes.
rows.bestFor: Players who want a chance to fight back instead of only hiding.
rows.value: TEMP V grants random superhero-style abilities when activated, making it the most direct round-changing purchase.

rows.howToGet: Use gameplay VC or free VC from codes before spending on cosmetic unlocks.
rows.bestFor: Beginners who get caught often and need more room for mistakes.
rows.value: First Aid Kits support longer survival during chase-heavy rounds.

rows.howToGet: Save VC from repeated play and milestone codes before buying skins.
rows.bestFor: Players who want to become the villain and collect hunter looks.
rows.value: Villain skins provide role identity and collection goals in Hide From The Villain.

rows.howToGet: Redeem active codes through the in-game Codes button on the left side of the screen.
rows.bestFor: Every player before making shop purchases.
rows.value: Codes give free VC and TEMP V, reducing the early grind before choosing tools or skins.

hftvVillainSkins.title: Hide From The Villain Villain Skins Guide
hftvVillainSkins.intro: Villain skins are the main long-term VC goal in Hide From The Villain for players who want to become the hunter. This priority list focuses on practical value, recognizable silhouettes, and role clarity.

tiers.name: TEMP V Before Skins
tiers.reason: TEMP V directly affects survival by granting random superhero abilities during a round.
tiers.bestFor: New and returning players who want immediate gameplay value before saving for cosmetics.
tiers.vcPlan: Buy or redeem TEMP V first, then save extra VC for villain skins.

tiers.name: Homelander
tiers.reason: A highly recognizable villain look that fits the core hide-and-hunt fantasy of Hide From The Villain.
tiers.bestFor: Players who want a clear hunter identity when becoming the villain.
tiers.vcPlan: Save VC after covering basic survival tools.

tiers.name: Omni-Man
tiers.reason: A strong collector target for players who want another major evil-superhero style option.
tiers.bestFor: Players focused on villain collection and role variety.
tiers.vcPlan: Unlock after a stable VC flow from codes and regular play.

tiers.name: Evil Superman-Style Skin
tiers.reason: A recognizable caped villain option for players who want visual variety.
tiers.bestFor: Collectors who already have their preferred main villain look.
tiers.vcPlan: Buy after higher-priority survival purchases and favorite skins.

hftvMaps.title: Hide From The Villain Maps Guide
hftvMaps.intro: Winning as a survivor in Hide From The Villain depends on stealth, map awareness, and timing. The best hiding spot is the one that still gives you an exit route when the villain checks the room.

cards.title: Start With Exit Awareness
cards.whatToDo: At the start of a round, move toward areas with more than one exit instead of hiding in a dead-end corner.
cards.why: A hiding place with no escape route turns one villain check into an instant loss.

cards.title: Use Stealth Before Speed
cards.whatToDo: Avoid obvious open paths when the villain is nearby, then reposition only after the threat moves away.
cards.why: The official game loop rewards hiding and stealth until rescue arrives.

cards.title: Keep TEMP V Routes in Mind
cards.whatToDo: Watch for TEMP V opportunities during movement and treat them as a comeback tool.
cards.why: TEMP V gives powers that let survivors fight back instead of only running.

cards.title: Do Not Stack the Whole Server
cards.whatToDo: Avoid clustering with too many survivors in one obvious room or hallway.
cards.why: One villain sweep can expose multiple players when everyone hides in the same predictable spot.

cards.title: Rotate After a Villain Check
cards.whatToDo: When the villain searches near your location and leaves, move to a fresh angle instead of staying frozen.
cards.why: Villains often re-check successful search zones, so changing position reduces repeat detection.

cards.title: Save Panic Movement for Rescue Timing
cards.whatToDo: When the rescue window is close, favor safe distance and line-of-sight breaks over risky item hunting.
cards.why: Late survival in Hide From The Villain is about avoiding the final mistake, not squeezing in one more flashy move.

hftvUpdates.title: Hide From The Villain Updates
hftvUpdates.intro: Track the important Hide From The Villain changes players care about: new codes, milestone rewards, shutdown compensation, and official community channels.

entries.title: 100KMembers Code
entries.details: The code 100KMembers rewards VC and TEMP V.
entries.impact: Useful for players who want both currency and a direct power item.

entries.title: 5kCCU Code
entries.details: The code 5kCCU rewards VC and TEMP V.
entries.impact: A strong milestone reward for players saving toward tools or villain skins.

entries.title: GAMEISBACK Code
entries.details: The code GAMEISBACK rewards 300 VC and 3 TEMP V.
entries.impact: One of the best starter rewards because it gives both spendable currency and multiple TEMP V uses.

entries.title: Hotfix Code
entries.impact: Good for saving toward shop purchases.

entries.title: SORRY4SHUTDOWN Code
entries.details: The code SORRY4SHUTDOWN rewards 150 VC and TEMP V.
entries.impact: A compensation reward that helps players recover value after downtime.

entries.title: Survival / 1 vs All Roblox Experience
entries.details: Hide From The Villain is listed as a Survival game with a 1 vs All sub-genre by Splitline: World.
entries.impact: The core loop stays simple: hide, use stealth, survive until help arrives, find TEMP V, or become the villain.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Hide From The Villain

questions.question: What is Hide From The Villain on Roblox?
questions.answer: Hide From The Villain is a Roblox 1-vs-all stealth survival game made by Splitline: World. Survivors hide from a villain, stay alive until help arrives, and can find TEMP V to fight back.

questions.question: How do I redeem Hide From The Villain codes?
questions.answer: Open Hide From The Villain, click the Codes button on the left side of the screen, paste the code with the correct capitalization, and press Redeem to claim your VC and TEMP V rewards.

questions.question: What is TEMP V in Hide From The Villain?
questions.answer: TEMP V is the fight-back mechanic in Hide From The Villain. It gives survivors powers so they can push back against the villain instead of only hiding and waiting for help.

questions.question: How do I earn VC in Hide From The Villain?
questions.answer: You earn VC in Hide From The Villain by playing rounds and redeeming active codes. VC is then spent on survival tools, TEMP V, and villain skins in the in-game shop.

questions.question: Where can I play Hide From The Villain?
questions.answer: Hide From The Villain is playable on the official Roblox experience page by Splitline: World. Always use the official Roblox page, group, and Discord instead of fake mirrors.

questions.question: Does Hide From The Villain get regular updates?
questions.answer: Yes. Hide From The Villain receives new codes, milestone rewards, and shutdown compensation. Returning players should check the official group and Discord before assuming an old code still works.
